sourceNotes: Andhra Pradesh 2006 scenario split news items (2006-01 to 2010-12)

newsItems.title: Aarogyasri Health Insurance Scheme Rolled Out (2006-01)
newsItems.description: YSR government launches the cashless health insurance scheme for BPL families, earning major rural popularity. In Andhra Pradesh, this monthly event shapes key state development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve aarogyasri_launch issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

reactionOptions.text: Demand that the government address aarogyasri_launch concerns and provide public subsidies.

risk.badOutcome: Discussions break down due to partisan standoffs, leading to minor public fatigue.

reactionOptions.text: Propose a joint multi-party round table to build consensus on aarogyasri_launch.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Jalayagnam Irrigation Projects Face Pricing Inquiries (2006-02)
newsItems.description: Opposition TDP submits files to the vigilance commission, alleging massive cost escalations in canal tenders. In Andhra Pradesh, this monthly event shapes key state development debates.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.
